job_id.description: ID of the job this run belongs to

creator_user_name.description: Username of the user who triggered the run

number_in_job.description: Sequence number of this run among all runs of the job

start_time.description: Start time of the run (epoch milliseconds)

setup_duration.description: Time spent setting up the cluster in milliseconds

execution_duration.description: Time spent executing the run in milliseconds

cleanup_duration.description: Time spent cleaning up after the run in milliseconds

end_time.description: End time of the run (epoch milliseconds)

attempt_number.description: Current attempt number of the run

run_page_url.description: URL of the run page in the Databricks UI
